street.description: Street or way on which the loading zone lies

side.description: Side of street the zone occupies; '-erly' source forms normalize to compass points ('southeasterly side' -> southeast); empty when the source states none. Extends common#side with intercardinal values pending their addition to _common.json

from_point.description: Named street or way anchoring the start of the zone (the X in 'from X' or 'from a point N feet DIR of X'); holds only the street name, never offset text

from_offset_feet.description: Distance in feet from from_point to where the zone begins; empty when the zone begins at from_point itself

from_offset_direction.description: Compass direction from from_point to the zone's start ('140 feet south of Beacon Street' -> south); empty when there is no offset. Proposed common#compass_point vocabulary, defined inline pending its addition to _common.json

extent_direction.description: Compass direction the zone runs from its start point; '-erly' source forms normalize ('southerly' -> south, 'northeasterly' -> northeast); empty for from/to endpoint entries. Proposed common#compass_point vocabulary, defined inline pending its addition to _common.json

length_feet.description: Length of the zone in feet along extent_direction; empty for from/to endpoint entries

to_point.description: Named street or way ending the zone, only for 'from X to Y' entries; empty when the extent is given as direction + length

time_limit_minutes.description: Loading time limit in minutes: 30 for entries under paragraph (a), 10 for entries under paragraph (b)

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier from the source not captured by the segment atoms (e.g. 'at the existing crosswalk', 'west drive of the Walnut Hill School')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
